---
title: "prepocessing"
output: html_document
date: "2026-07-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

---
# ---- Load packages ----------------------------------------------------------
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
```


```{r}
# ---- Load Dataset ----------------------------------------------------------
data_path = "C:/Users/farza/Job/Github/Melbourne-Housing-Market/data/raw/Melbourne_housing_FULL.csv"
df = read.csv(data_path)
```

```{r}
# ---- summary of dataset
summary(df)
```

```{r}
# ---- Analysing null values
colSums(is.na(df))
```

```{r}
df$BuildingArea
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
